name: Nephilabyss, the Ogdoadic Overlord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>溟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ネフェルアビス
desc: If a monster(s) is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon monsters until the end of the next turn, except Reptile monsters. If you control this card that was Special Summoned from the GY: You can target 1 monster in your GY, except "Nephilabyss, the Ogdoadic Overlord"; Special Summon it. You can only use each effect of "Nephilabyss, the Ogdoadic Overlord" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster(s) is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon monsters until the end of the next turn, except Reptile monsters. eff: If a monster(s) is sent from the hand or Deck to the GY, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card, also you cannot Special Summon monsters until the end of the next turn, except Reptile monsters. action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
